name: Clear the Trench
description: Two Rock-Shell Crabs have breached Trench Alpha's eastern perimeter. Eliminate them before they tear through the defensive line.
accept_text: Thorn marks the breach on the map with a red X. 'Two crabs, Trench Alpha, east wall. Standard shells won't crack that armor — you'll need to find the weak points, the joints, the undercarriage.' He hands you a set of coordinates. 'Clear them. Don't die. In that order.'
complete_text: Thorn nods once. The kind of nod that says he expected you to succeed but is glad you're not dead. 'Clean work. That's how it's done. Take your pay — you've earned it.'
